posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I would like to have your advice on the following issue :
In Monday I have 3 distinct boards : board 1, 2 and 3. Here is the steps :

  • Step 1 : I create an item in board 1
  • Step 2 : when I change the item to “done”, two automations create a item in board 2 and an item in board 3, and these items are connected through links columns
  • Step 3 : I would like to create an automation to link the item from board 2 and 3 together with a link column but I am stuck on this point. T tried this automation but the link column in between board 2 and 3 in the board 2 and 3 is still empty :

Do you have any advice or suggestions about that use case ?

Thank you for your help,

Corentin
